description: Create a comprehensive GitHub Actions workflow named Build and test that runs on pushes to master and dev branches, on dev pull requests, and on a weekly schedule. The workflow should have multiple jobs, including pre-commit, linux, packet-only, dpdk, and pfring, each running in a specific container environment and performing various tasks such as checking out code, installing dependencies, building and testing PcapPlusPlus, and uploading coverage results to Codecov.
